ame snapshot helper invoked here BEFORE the legacy anchor write
Anchor write: kind chain executes (low-cost-server first for codex, falls through to narrative

thSharedContext or tryLlmAgent inline; codex chain reset via publishCompactedAndResetChain

h snapshot.info shape and new id; copy parts with fresh part ids targeting new

Skip replay: snapshot already after anchor (race); record o
Skip replay: no unanswered user msg OR feature flag disabled

on execution; debug.log line per AGENTS.md rule 1; thread {observed, kind} through publishC
ompactedAndResetChain so recentEvents records the correct observed value (not unknown)
decideContinueInjection (replaces INJECT_CONTINUE table): inspect post-anchor stream; if
replayed=true OR any user msg already exists post-anchor → skip Continue; if no user msg
post-anchor AND observed permits ambient continuation → call injectContinueAfterAnchor
Runloop continues: filterCompacted re-scans stream; lastUser is guaranteed non-
undefined when pre-condition was met (replayed user msg has id > anchor.id); nex
t LLM call has the user's actual question instead of synthetic Continue substitute
